title: Test
summary: Refineries, chemical plants, and major industrial facilities run on decades-old legacy documentation and fragmented alert systems. We are building the AI models to decipher and automate this infrastructure. As a Foundational Engineer, you will own the critical applied-AI territory, mapping deep industrial constraints and transforming raw operational data into robust architectural systems.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Deconstruct complex industrial protocols (like ISA-18.2) and translate them into concrete product specifications for our AI.
Rapidly prototype applied AI solutions using LLMs and Agentic workflows against real industrial time-series data.
Own the primary data architecture for alarm events, asset hierarchies, and rationalization logic.
Conduct high-level technical interviews with reliability managers to align models with pragmatic ground-truth workflows.
Architect scalable system blueprints and collaborate closely with product engineers for production deployment.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: Demonstrated capability of architecting and solving ambiguous technical problems from absolute zero.
High fluency in Python, extensive experience with modern LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex), and API integration.
A strong appetite for deep technical research, reading dry standard docs, and parsing complex research papers.
Strong operational flexibility; you adapt to new evidence quickly and do not over-index on initial assumptions.
Bonus: Prior exposure to industrial data sets, time-series forecasting, or signal processing.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: You will have supreme autonomy over the applied AI direction of a product serving the most critical infrastructure on earth.
You will act as an engineering pillar, setting the technical bar and heavily influencing future team scaling.
Uncapped career trajectory as we aggressively disrupt a multi-billion dollar industrial automation market.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. Technical links you're proud of (GitHub, personal website, or a deployed project).
2. A concise explanation of the most ambiguous technical problem you've recently solved.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.

title: Product Engineer
summary: Currently, the physical infrastructure that builds the world runs on legacy software. We are building the AI layer to replace it. As a Product Engineer at InquisLab, you will own the end-to-end execution of our flagship software, turning raw industrial data paradigms into hyper-reliable production systems used in strictly regulated environments.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Architect and build our core web application, from robust data ingestion pipelines to the customer-facing dashboard.
Wire up and scale LLM pipelines capable of turning raw industrial data into high-fidelity, audit-grade reports.
Own infrastructure deployment, continuous monitoring, and the initial customer zero-to-one implementation.
Collaborate natively with applied researchers to transition complex industrial logic into stable, performant code.
Interface with customers to iterate aggressively, prioritizing rapid shipping over delayed perfection.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: High fluency in modern web frameworks (React/Next.js) and backend architectures (Node/Python, PostgreSQL).
A proven track record of shipping end-to-end products that users actually rely on in production.
Strong product intuition and design taste; you can seamlessly identify and correct UX friction.
The instinct to iterate rapidly, ship iteratively, and thrive in high-velocity startup environments.
A zero-ego approach to problem solving and cross-functional engineering collaboration.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: You will own the production codebase of a platform targeting the most critical physical infrastructure on earth.
You will be a foundational member of the product team, defining our engineering culture and execution velocity.
Significant long-term equity and uncapped growth trajectory as we establish our dominant position in the market.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. Technical links you're proud of (GitHub, personal website, or a deployed project).
2. A brief overview of an end-to-end product feature you have shipped.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.

title: Growth Marketing Lead
summary: We are introducing transformative AI to a massive, traditional physical industry. As the Growth Marketing Lead, you will orchestrate our entire go-to-market engine. You will extract deep insights directly from plant operators, build targeted distribution channels, and scale our initial customer base from absolute zero into a predictable growth curve.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Extract and document deep pain points directly from plant operators, reliability managers, and industrial decision makers.
Architect extremely precise B2B target lists (Indian refineries, chemical plants, manufacturing DCs).
Write high-converting, deeply-researched hooks and campaign scripts aimed strictly at enterprise buyers.
Translate complex technical engineering advancements into highly accessible customer-facing product positioning.
Own the CRM lifecycle, scaling intelligent cold outreach, tracking engagement, and coordinating demos.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: You are an exceptional, concise writer who inherently understands how to drive an audience to action.
Deep natural curiosity for complex industrial systems, B2B sales cycles, and physical engineering operations.
High proficiency in cold outreach, CRM management, and scaling outbound campaigns.
An extremely high threshold for rejection and a purely analytical approach to iterating on messaging.
Bonus: Prior startup GTM experience or B2B enterprise SaaS marketing.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: Supreme autonomy to build the go-to-market engine of a technical startup from scratch.
Close integration with product engineering, giving you a deep understanding of AI-driven industrial systems.
The opportunity to scale the growth team and step into significant leadership as the company accelerates.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. A portfolio piece, writing sample, or metric-backed summary of a campaign you led.
2. What excites you about selling software to industrial categories.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.

title: Creative Director / Video
summary: To modernize a physical industry, you must tell a visually compelling story. As the Creative Director of Video, you will own the entire visual and narrative output of InquisLab. You will distill massive industrial engineering problems into highly engaging, high-fidelity tech overviews and viral campaigns that command the attention of industrial leaders.

sections.title: Expect to focus on
bullets: Direct, edit, and produce high-impact 30–90 second videos that visually translate our software's industrial impact.
Leverage modern AI tooling (Runway, ElevenLabs, Descript, etc.) to maintain a high-frequency production cadence without a full crew.
Own and scale all primary social distribution channels (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube), driving consistent impressions.
A/B test thumbnails, hooks, and pacing to reverse-engineer viral distribution mechanisms in B2B environments.
Collaborate with engineering to capture product feature drops in highly aesthetic, dynamic formats.

sections.title: You may be a good fit if you
bullets: A demonstrable portfolio of high-performing video content built for modern platforms (YouTube, Reels, TikTok).
Expertise with both traditional editing suites (Premiere/FCP) and cutting-edge generative AI production tools.
An exceptional intuition for visual pacing, storytelling, and what successfully interrupts a user's scroll.
The ability to aggressively ship functional v1s and iterate based on analytical feedback.
Bonus: Experience executing visual campaigns for technical products or SaaS platforms.

sections.title: InquisLab is for you if
bullets: Total creative ownership over the brand narrative and visual direction of an emergent AI company.
Exposure at the frontier of industrial automation—framing systems that nobody else is currently documenting.
Massive career upside as you build out and lead the internal creative studio of a scaling industry leader.

applyBody:
Please share:

1. Direct links to the highest-performing or best-produced videos you have created.
2. A short breakdown of your video production tooling stack.
3. Why you are interested in InquisLab.

No cover letters required.
